name: wait_for_webhook_routing_demo
description: Demonstrates per-instance webhook routing. Many parallel instances of this workflow run simultaneously, each waiting for a webhook event that carries their specific orderId. The wildcard match '${workflow.input.orderId}' ensures each instance is completed only by the event addressed to it. POST to /webhook/{id} with body {"event": {"orderId": "<orderId>"}} to route to the matching instance.
